content.en:
"Come on, I'm about to create a form secret method that fits me perfectly!"

Ye Tian was also very excited.

Create a secret method in his own form, and his strength will be increased by horror.

It is said that those peak Ancient Demon-level existences who have created secret methods that fit their own forms are completely different from those who have cultivated the secret methods of form created by others.

If you create a secret method that suits your own form, you can definitely easily defeat an existence of the same level.

And Ye Tian also knew a rumor, if he couldn't even create a secret method that fit his own form, then such a peak ancient demon-level existence had almost no hope of breaking through to an ultimate ancient demon-level existence.

Therefore, it is important to create your own form secret method that fits you.

Of course, you can also not create, but you can't cultivate any form secret method, otherwise it will have a huge impact on the body.

But if you don't even know the form secret method, such an ancient demon-level existence is also the weakest kind.

Another period of time has passed.

Finally, Ye Tian created a form secret method that perfectly fits himself-Ten Thousand Law Form!

The form of ten thousand laws is the form he created after collecting many form secret methods and taking their essence to remove their dross, which is perfectly matched with the ultimate body of ten thousand laws, and can give full play to his own strength and advantages.

At present, the first form and the second form have only been created, and the third form has not yet been created.

After all, he can only cultivate to the second form at present, how can he be able to produce the third form, he doesn't have enough understanding!

The first form of the Ten Thousand Laws form can triple the size of the body, the ultimate particle can grow, and the speed will be more than doubled, the defense power will also skyrocket, and it can also bless the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm.

The second form is compressed back to its original size, but the strength of the physical body can be increased by more than ten times, and it has a terrifying self-healing ability, and the ultimate particle can be restored after it collapses.

In addition, the second form can also avoid the effect of injury, ordinary emperor-level attacks are directly injury-free, and strong people who are not much different from their own strength can be injured by about thirty percent.

Therefore, the second form of the Ten Thousand Laws form is very perverted!

Rumble!!!

After Ye Tian created the secret method of the Ten Thousand Law Form, the first cultivation of the new copy body instantly caused the physical body to begin to reorganize and transform, and the True Lin Form was gradually swallowed by the Ten Thousand Law Form, which no longer affected the breakthrough of the Ancient Demon Level Realm!

Moreover, after he created the Mystic Method of Ten Thousand Law Forms, it also helped to impact the Ancient Demon Level Realm!

At this moment, if he wanted to break through to the ancient demon level, he could break through with a single thought, which was even easier than his breakthrough in his own era!

In the days that followed, Ye Tian began to cultivate the Mystic Method of Ten Thousand Law Forms.

Since he created it himself, it was very easy for him to cultivate, and he easily cultivated the first form of the Ten Thousand Laws Form to the consummation realm.

After that, he began to attack the second form, and soon broke through to the second form entry.

In the blink of an eye, a long time had passed, and he had cultivated his second form to the Dacheng realm, which was not far from the consummation realm.

But once he cultivated to the consummation realm, he could choose to break through to the ancient demon level realm, or he could continue to create a second form secret method, after all, one form secret method and two form secret methods, the combat effectiveness was different.

Just like Amusha, the powerhouse who is the number one in the Emperor List of the Aromu Fortress, even if Ye Tian defeated three incomparably powerful ancient demon-level powerhouses last time, he still did not occupy the first place, obviously Amusha is not simple.

This is the benefit of the multi-form secret method, which can make the combat power very terrifying!

And if Ye Tian created his own form secret method, it would not affect the breakthrough, and it would be a good thing to create several form secret methods so much.

However, after all, the Mystic Method of Ten Thousand Forms is a Mystic Form that contains many aspects, and the inclusion of many aspects means that all aspects are somewhat mediocre.

If he wants to create a second form secret method, he can start to create it from a single aspect, such as defense, speed, or attack.

If you create a form secret method that only strengthens defense, then the form secret method created must surpass the ten thousand form secret method in terms of defense.

And the reason why Ye Tian wanted to create an incomparably comprehensive Mystic Method of Ten Thousand Law Forms was that he didn't want to have flaws.

But the second form secret method does not require comprehensiveness.

"It's very important to save your life, then the second form secret method can start with defense!" Ye Tian decided.......

Anyway, he is not in a hurry to break through the ancient demon-level realm, in the Huoxi space-time battlefield, breaking through the ancient demon-level realm, his strength will be suppressed very much, in fact, his combat power here will not improve much.

So, he is in no hurry to break through.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian set out to create a second form secret method, which focused on defense.

Since he had already created a form secret method and already had experience in creating a second form secret method, it wouldn't take that long!

......

Aromu Fortress.

Inside a deep palace.

A woman with a bewitching figure sat here, and below stood a number of ancient demon-level powerhouses.

This woman is Amusha, who is the number one on the emperor list!

An Ancient Demon-level powerhouse congratulated.

If the Emperor List powerhouses in the outside world knew that so many ancient demon-level powerhouses were so respectful to Amusha, they would be very surprised.

After all, it is rumored that Amusha has no hope of breaking through the ancient demon-level powerhouse, which ancient demon-level powerhouse would be so respectful to Amusha?

"I've been in retreat, has there been anything big going on in the Huoxi Battlefield lately?" Amusha asked.

An ancient demon-level powerhouse said: "Lord Amusha, recently there has been a very demonic Emperor List powerhouse in the Aromu Fortress, who has created the Ultimate Arcane of the Peak 2.2 Peak, comprehended the Ultimate Rule Realm, and ranked second on the Emperor List. "

Amusa was slightly surprised, "Created the pinnacle ultimate arcane and comprehended the ultimate rule realm, but it is also very demonic, who is it?"

"Heaven, from a small tribe under the command of the Lord of the Arrows!"

The Ancient Demon-level powerhouse said.

"Interestingly, it seems that a small tribe can give birth to such a demonic existence, it seems that there are many chances!"

"Lord Amusha, there is a message from the main headquarters that the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space will be opened in a short time. The Ancient Demon-level powerhouse said.

"If the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space is opened, I will go, but I will take seventy percent of the treasures I obtained, and thirty percent of them will be given to the clan!"

"Yes, Lord Amusha!"

Many ancient demon-level powerhouses responded.
